# Video to Audio

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/videoToAudio`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/videoToAudio/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DVtlUOrc.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-video-to-audio`
- `query-video-to-audio-single`
- `query-video-to-audio-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/audio/video-to-audio`
- `/v1/audio/video-to-audio/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Video to Audio",zh:"视频生音效"},endpoints:[{id:"create-video-to-audio",method:"POST",path:"/v1/audio/video-to-audio",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"video_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The ID of the video generated by the Kling AI",zh:"通过可灵 AI 生成的视频的 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Either the video_id parameter or the video_url parameter, cannot be empty or have a value at the same time.",zh:"- 与 video_url 参数二选一填写，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- Only supports videos generated within 30 days and with a duration between 3.0s and 20.0s.",zh:"- 仅支持 30 天内生成并且长度在 3.0 秒-20.0 秒的视频"}]},{name:"video_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Link for uploaded video",zh:"所上传视频的获取链接"},notes:[{en:"- Either the video_id parameter or the video_url parameter, cannot be empty or have a value at the same time.",zh:"- 与 video_id 参数二选一填写，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- Only .mp4/.mov formats are supported. File size does not exceed 100MB.
```
